images.prompt: Cartoon-style Christmas market poster: 'Weihnachtsmarkt am Rathausplatz'. Shows Christmas stalls, tree, lights, 25 Nov-23 Dec, free entry, Glühwein 3€. Fuxie cartoon, festive red/green/gold, legible font.

Cartoon-style summer festival poster: 'Sommerfest im Stadtpark'. Shows outdoor stage, bands, bouncy castle, fireworks, 15 July 14-22 Uhr, entry 5€. Fuxie cartoon, summer green/yellow/orange, legible font.
